mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_items) as totalLostItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claim_records) as totalClaimRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_items WHERE status = 'RETURNED') as returnedItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_time) = CURDATE()) as todayNewUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_items WHERE DATE(created_time) = CURDATE()) as todayNewLostItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claim_records WHERE DATE(created_time) = CURDATE()) as todayNewClaimRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claim_records WHERE status = 'PENDING') as pendingClaimRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE YEAR(created_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())) as monthNewUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_items WHERE YEAR(created_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())) as monthNewLostItems, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM claim_records WHERE YEAR(created_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())) as monthNewClaimRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_items WHERE status = 'RETURNED' AND YEAR(created_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())) as monthReturnedItems

SELECT li.category_id as categoryId, ic.category_name as categoryName, COUNT(*) as count FROM lost_items li JOIN item_categories ic ON li.category_id = ic.id GROUP BY li.category_id, ic.category_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT lost_location as location, COUNT(*) as count FROM lost_items WHERE lost_location IS NOT NULL AND lost_location != '' GROUP BY lost_location ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT CASE status WHEN 'LOST' THEN 0 WHEN 'FOUND' THEN 1 WHEN 'RETURNED' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM lost_items GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT YEAR(created_time) as year, MONTH(created_time) as month, COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FOUND' THEN 1 END) as claimCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RETURNED' THEN 1 END) as returnCount FROM lost_items WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL AND created_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY YEAR(created_time), MONTH(created_time) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT YEAR(created_time) as year, MONTH(created_time) as month, COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FOUND' THEN 1 END) as claimCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RETURNED' THEN 1 END) as returnCount FROM lost_items WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(created_time) = #{year} GROUP BY YEAR(created_time), MONTH(created_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC
